chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2656 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.5804/2021. For orders on MA No.5805/2021. For hearing of main case. 17-11-2022 Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi advocate for petitioners. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. Mr. Mazhar Din Khoso advocate for respondents. Learned counsel for respondents has filed reply to show-cause notice and submits that salaries are being released to the petitioners, however, some amount is outstanding against the HMC will be cleared off as soon as possible preferably within a period of three months. Learned counsel for petitioners is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with all pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
